titleStmt.title: SII 9.704: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 704. (A.R. No. 233 of 1928.) ON A SLAB SET UP IN FRONT OF THE VARADARAJA-PERUMAL TEMPLE AT PAPPARAPPATTI, DHARMAPURI TALUK, SALEM DISTRICT.

summary.p: This record is dated Śaka 1639, Kali 4818, Hēvaḷambi, Adhika-Jyēshṭha, śu. 15 corresponding to A.D. 1717 June 14, Tuesday (not verifiable), in the reign of the Mysore king Kṛishṇarāja-Voḍeya (II) ruling at Śrīraṇgapattaṇa. It registers the grant of 3600 varāhas, being the income from 12 villages (named), in Kunnekoḷa-hōbaḷi a sub-division of Vīrabhadradurga-sīme, for the services of the god Kamchi-Varada rāja through the agency of Aḷagiyamanavāḷa-Rāmānujajīyar.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu . svasti śrīvija
yadbhudayaśālivāha
naśakha 1639 kalyā
dya 4818 saṁdā va
rttamānavādā hēva
ḷaṁbisaṁvatsaradā
Adhikajēṣṭa śu 15 lu
śrīmanmahārā
jādhirājā rājapara
mēśvara prahuḍhapratāpa
narapati śrīvīrakriṣṇarāya
vaḍeyaraiyyanavaru śrīraṁ
ggapaṭaṇadalu ratnaśiṁ
hāsanārūḍharāgi pruthvīsā
mrājyaṁgaiyuttiralu
kaṁci varadarājasvāmiya
vara saṁnidiyalu Aḷagha
yamanavāḷa rāmānuja
jīyaravara havālinali
śāśvatavāgi naḍasikoṁ
ḍu baruva nityakayiṁkarya
ke vīrabhadradurggada sīme
kuṁnekoḷada hō
baḷiyalu pāpāra
paṭi grāma 1 yake
re 1 yeṭigānahaḷi
grāma 1 Acāra
haḷi grāma 1 kamala
nāyakanahaḷi grāma 1
gullapānāyaka
nahaḷi grāma 1
mādehaḷi grāma 1
bēlūru grāma 1
varatehaḷi grāma 1
beḷacārahaḷi grā
ma 1 sakulaha
ḷi grāma 1 vyāpali
haḷi grāma 1 nala
panākana haḷi grāma
1 Aṁtu grā 12
kere 1 saha sahi
ra(ṁ)ṇyōdakadhāra
purvakavāgi dhāre
neredu koṭṭadu dur(ṁ)
mukhisaṁvatsarada
huṭuvaḷi prākāra
kaṁgu 500 ke sale
terupālu nāgarā
ga 625 yī dha
rmma śāśvitavāgi
caṁdrāsūryādi
tārevarigū naḍaśi
koṁḍu baruvudu .
Digital edition of SII 9.704 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
